news.title: OPEC+ reportedly expected to approve another oil output increase for August
news.summary: Investing.com -- OPEC+ is expected to approve another increase in oil production targets at its meeting on Sunday, with member countries likely to raise output by 188,000 barrels per day from August, Reuters reported, citing sources familiar with the discussions.

news.title: OPEC+ set to approve another oil output increase, sources say
news.summary: LONDON, July 5 (Reuters) - OPEC+ is set to agree on Sunday another increase in output targets from August, sources with knowledge of the matter said, adding ‌to global supply amid falling oil prices due to a gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz ‌for oil exports. The oil producing group has agreed in principle to increase quotas by 188,000 barrels per day from August, on top of similar ​increases for June and July, one OPEC+ source said ahead of the group's meeting later on Sunday.

news.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Backs Verkada And Brings In A Microsoft Veteran To Lead Sales

The company also appointed former Microsoft executive Nicholas Parker as EVP, Worldwide Field Operations, signaling a change in its go to market leadership.
